script.text: Welcome to the Chakra Journey. In this practice, we'll explore the seven main energy centers of your body.
Chakras are spinning wheels of energy that run along your spine, from base to crown.
When balanced, they create harmony in body, mind, and spirit.
Sit comfortably with spine straight. This allows energy to flow freely.
Close your eyes and take three deep, cleansing breaths.
Set an intention to open yourself to healing energy and spiritual awareness.
Let's begin our journey from the earth to the heavens.
Bring awareness to the base of your spine. This is Muladhara, the Root Chakra, glowing red.
This is your foundation, your connection to earth. Feel grounded, safe, secure.
Visualize red healing light at the base of your spine, spinning gently clockwise.
Now move up to your lower abdomen, just below the navel. Svadhisthana, the Sacral Chakra, orange in color.
This is your creative center, your passion. Feel orange light swirling here, opening your creativity.
Move up to your solar plexus, just above the navel. Manipura, the Solar Plexus Chakra, bright yellow.
This is your power center, your confidence. See golden yellow light radiating from here, filling you with strength.
These three lower chakras are now balanced and glowing. You feel rooted, creative, and empowered.
Bring awareness to your heart center, in the middle of your chest. Anahata, the Heart Chakra, green and pink.
This is love, compassion, connection. Feel your heart opening like a lotus flower, radiating green healing light.
Breathe into your heart. Send love to yourself, then to all beings.
Move to your throat. Vishuddha, the Throat Chakra, sky blue in color.
This is your voice, your truth. See blue light swirling here, giving you clarity in expression.
Now to the space between your eyebrows. Ajna, the Third Eye Chakra, indigo or purple.
This is intuition, inner wisdom, spiritual sight. Visualize deep purple light here, opening your inner vision.
Finally, the crown of your head. Sahasrara, the Crown Chakra, violet or pure white light.
This is your connection to the divine, to universal consciousness. See white light pouring down from above, through your crown.
All seven chakras are now aligned and glowing. You are a pillar of light, from earth to sky.
Now, visualize all seven chakras at once. See them as seven glowing lights along your spine.
Watch as they begin to spin in harmony, creating a unified column of rainbow light.
This is your true nature, balanced, whole, radiant.
Seal this energy by bringing your hands to heart center in prayer position.
Silently offer gratitude for this healing journey.
Begin to deepen your breath. Gently move your body.
When ready, open your eyes, knowing your chakras remain balanced and aligned.
You may practice this journey anytime you need energetic realignment. Om Shanti. Peace.
